overall.description: Sci-fi game footage from a first-person cockpit perspective. The player prepares a flying vehicle inside an industrial hangar, takes off through opening bay doors, and flies through a hazy, neon-lit futuristic metropolis with towering skyscrapers. The atmosphere features heavy orange-brown smog with dramatic volumetric lighting.

events.description: cockpit canopy closes sealing the pilot inside the vehicle
HUD systems activate displaying orange holographic flight interfaces

agents.ego_description: sealing the canopy and booting up the vehicle's systems while stationary in the hangar, then grasping the flight controls

entered.detail: transparent armored canopy closing overhead with visible frame seals
industrial gray metal plating with yellow-black caution stripes
massive closed hangar door with warning markings and overhead lights
illuminated interfaces with orange backlighting on the cockpit sides

segments.scene_description: The scene opens inside a dimly lit industrial hangar from a sealed cockpit perspective. The player closes the canopy and activates holographic HUD displays. The environment features metal walls with safety markings and a large closed bay door ahead, with the vehicle remaining stationary on the concrete floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: hangar exit ramp transitioning to exterior

events.description: hangar bay doors begin opening revealing bright hazy exterior
vehicle lifts off the ground and accelerates toward the exit
exiting the hangar into diffuse hazy daylight with orange atmospheric tint

agents.ego_description: piloting the vehicle upward and forward through the opening hangar doors, transitioning from enclosed space to open air

entered.detail: futuristic skyscrapers with glowing windows visible through the opening doors
bright orange-tinted cloudy sky visible as the doors open
large floating holographic text marker indicating the location

segments.scene_description: The vehicle initiates takeoff as the massive hangar doors open overhead, revealing a hazy orange sky and distant city skyline. The camera tilts upward showing the door mechanism, then moves forward through the exit threshold as the lighting shifts from artificial to natural diffused daylight. The TEASA SPACEPORT marker becomes visible as the drone emerges into the open air.

events.description: ascending rapidly above the spaceport into the dense urban airspace
flying deeper into the city center with buildings rising on all sides

agents.ego_description: flying the drone through the hazy metropolis, ascending between towering skyscrapers with neon yellow accents and navigating aerial traffic lanes

entered.detail: tall buildings with distinctive yellow neon edge lighting and glass facades
floating structures and connecting bridges between buildings
cluster of the tallest buildings creating narrow aerial corridors

segments.scene_description: The drone flies freely through a sprawling futuristic city blanketed in orange atmospheric haze. Towering skyscrapers with yellow neon accents rise on all sides as the vehicle ascends through aerial traffic corridors. The dense urban environment features elevated platforms and connecting bridges, with the architecture becoming increasingly imposing as the drone penetrates deeper into the city center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective as a vehicle transitions from the enclosed confines of an industrial hangar into the vast, smog-filled expanse of a futuristic metropolis. It begins inside a dimly lit bay where the cockpit canopy seals and holographic HUD displays flicker to life against a backdrop of metal walls and concrete. As the massive overhead doors slide open, the camera tilts upward to reveal a hazy orange sky before gliding forward through the exit threshold, shifting from artificial interior lighting to a diffused natural glow past the Teasa Spaceport marker. The scene then expands into a sprawling urban landscape blanketed in atmospheric haze, where the vehicle ascends through aerial corridors flanked by towering skyscrapers with yellow neon accents. Finally, the drone penetrates deeper into the city center, weaving past elevated platforms and connecting bridges as the architecture becomes increasingly imposing.
